questions.q: According to a campaign launched on April 21, 2026, proposed new library charges will heavily penalize book lovers in which English county?
Who defeated world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler on the first playoff hole to win the 2026 RBC Heritage at Harbour Town?
Which sci-fi action-adventure game by Capcom surpassed one million units sold worldwide just two days after its April 2026 launch?
On April 20, 2026, scientists revealed a new plant-based serum derived from Centella asiatica that is proven in clinical tests to significantly boost hair density and regrow hair in how many weeks?
An exiled Uyghur scholar's international book tour ended abruptly in April 2026 after he was detained at an airport in which country, allegedly on orders from Beijing?
In April 2026, a collection of 17 rare books stolen decades ago from a Long Island estate resurfaced in Manhattan. The collection prominently included letters written by which poet?
Which former Georgia Bulldogs wide receiver and top 2026 NFL Draft prospect was arrested on misdemeanor charges just days before the draft?
On April 20, 2026, the American Library Association announced that book bans had reached record highs. Which 2006 novel about sex trafficking in India topped their list of most challenged books?
options: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

questions.q: Nintendo announced that the single-player spin-off game 'Splatoon Raiders' will launch for the Switch 2 in July 2026, featuring which in-game band?
Published on April 21, 2026, the highly anticipated novel 'Last Night in Brooklyn', which follows a 26-year-old moving back to Fort Greene, was written by which author?
